transcript.text:
I drank a bit too much yesterday heh
(An extraordinary hangover cure of a big eater)
(Yukgaejang* kalguksu**, a deep flavor of 50 years of tradition!) *Spicy beef soup, knife-cut noodles
(This ain't some ordinary yukgaejang kalguksu...!!)
(Soak the noodles in the soup like buckwheat noodles!!)
(Inhale the noodles)
(Then...)
(Add some more)
(Hangover cure round 1 COMPLETE)
(Now let's start filling the stomach)
(Hangover cure round 2 COMPLETE)
(She's serious about curing her hangovers...)
(The alcohol-metabolizing mukbang begins now...)
(Moderate drinking is good for a hangover cure mukbang...)
(One rainy day...)
Hello everyone

I'm in Moonbae-dong today
(Famous restaurant in Moonbae-dong?!) There's a very famous place here!
Apparently it's the first place in Korea
that made yukgaejang kalguksu
(The origin of yukgaejang kalguksu) This is where the word "yukkal" comes from
Apparently it has about 50 years of tradition
People line up during the lunch time
(Gotta eat kalguksu on rainy days!) It's raining and also I was craving for it
It looks like a very old restaurant
(Located in Yongsan-gu, Seoul)
("Munbae-dong Yukkal")
(Entering the restaurant) Hello
(A pretty cool greeting lol) Sorry about my hands...
- I enjoy watching your videos! - Really?
(Thank you!)
(I'll enjoy the meal today!) I heard that this place has amazing kalguksu

I visited because it's so famous
- Enjoy your meal - Thank you
They've been in business here for almost 50 years
(The timely atmosphere remains) Every nook and cranny shows the history of this place
Even this fan lol
(The symbol of nostalgia...) It's the old fan
They only have 2 menu itemss
(Yukgaejang + kalguksu / yukgaejang + rice) (You can choose between noodle or rice!)
(Yukkal only has kalguksu!) Would 3 bowls of kalguksu
(The yukgaejang already has some noodles!) and 2 bowls of rice be enough?
I'll have 3 bowls of kalguksu
and 2 bowls of yukgaejang
(I don't need the noodles in the yukgaejang!) I'll have 3 of them as noodles, and 2 as rice
(Done ordering) Thank you
(Excited just from ordering...) I'm already excited!
(The origin of yukkal, yukgaejang with 50 years of tradition!)

(Served to Tzuyang!)
- It's hot - It's okay
Looks delicious
Thank you!
(The yukgaejang is here!)
Thank you
(The kalguksu and rice, yukkal + yukgaejang are all here!)
(Ta-da!) Look delicious!
This
yukgaejang soup
already looks very thick at first glance
I'll taste the broth quickly!
(Already excited from the looks...) It feels like it's my favorite type of broth
The broth is very thick!
Wow, it's totally my favorite type of soup!!
The broth is really thick and rich

The flavor is strong
(Rich yukgaejang flavor...!) and delicious
She eats a lot lol
Thanks for the meal!
I'm sobering up!
Let's add some noodles
Dump it in
I'm supposed to add it little by little
But I'm not that patient
(How can you resist this...?)
Looks so delicious!!
The meat inside
is so crazy
The noodles are also my favorite, chewy kalguksu noodles
Wow... amazing...!
I'm sobering up x2

(You're watching Tzuyang curing her hangover) So nice
(Surprised by the amount) There's meat inside
like this
(The yukgaejang has a hearty amount of noodles and meat...) There's a bunch of meat inside
It tastes like it's been boiled for a long time
Amazing
(The best pairing with kalguksu!) Let's try the kimchi
It's delicious
(Seriously?) Look at this meat!
There's really a lot of meat, it's so big
(The flavor makes her choke) Amazing
So nice
(She's inhaling without breathing...)
(Chills down the spine)
It's refreshingly spicy!
It's spicy and yet refreshing!

(Watch out if you can't take spicy well) The spiciness will grow
(Chugging down the soup...)
(Refreshingly clears a bowl!)
(Absolutely clean...)
(She looks very satisfied...lol)
Since I had noodles, let's try the rice now
Let's get a spoonful of rice
(The soup on her mouth made her into the Joker lol)
It also goes so well with rice!
(The producer's recommendation = pepper!)
(Sprinkling pepper)
(Added without hesitation!)
Wow, look at that thick broth!
(Rearranging) Let's put this to the front
(Adds the rice right away!)
Actually, I prefer...

rich and thick soup
over clean soup
This is exactly what I want
(Looks a bit spicy though...!)
(Found it!) There was radish kimchi?
Radish kimchi
Amazing! It's so good!!
To here...
(Yukgaejang topped with radish kimchi!)
(The alcohol is being flushed away...)
This is the best cure for hangover...
(She really did) I drank too much yesterday...
The radish kimchi is so good
Is it because I drank a lot? I feel like...
(Burning inside) it's burning here
(Chugging down the soup again...)

(Yukgaejang CLEAR!)
(Looks like she's definitely curing her hangover)
This time
The people who eat this regularly
(How the regular customers eat!) originally eat it like this
They add the noodles bit by bit like soba
(Soak it in the yukgaejang!) You're not supposed to dump in the noodles at once
(Come on in)
So delicious
(The water bottle...) This is...
(Essentials) It's like the one in my grandma's house lol
This way of eating
definitely makes the soup soak in better
I know it'll be the same, but it feels that way!
(Let's add the rest!)
This way, most of the broth stays

(Tzuyang suddenly looks moved...?) Oh my! Thank you, ma'am
(A beverage gift from the owner!) The owner gave me a drink
Thank you!
(Slurping the meat instead of noodles...)
(Third bowl CLEAR except the broth!)
They warmed up the yukgaejang for me!
(Adding noodles into the warm yukgaejang)
(It's so hot... hot and delicious...)
It's so nice
(Finished already)
(Please don't forget me...)
There were more noodles left
Should I put them all in?
(So cool)
These noodles...
I prefer thick kalguksu noodles over thin ones

The round and thick ones
These noodles also have that chewy texture
They're also thick, so they're delicious
Oh...?
Did this also turn cold...?
(Glimpse)
(The owner noticed and took the yukgaejang lol) Thank you
(Time to inhale)
(Fourth bowl CLEAR!!) So good!
(Metabolized all the alcohol)
(Finally the last yukgaejang!) The last bowl!
It's so hot!
(Heartfelt amount of rice... lol) They pressed the rice down so much
It also tastes so good with rice!
(Mixing the rice with the soup again lol)
Mix up the rice

Koreans are all about rice!
(Endlessly curing her hangover...)
This one has a lot of meat!!
(Meat party)
(Radish kimchi is a must with rice) The radish kimchi tastes so good
(Get a bunch of meat first)
(Nom nom)
(For the rest of the time...)
(she sincerely cured her hangover...)
(If you know, you know...)
(The last spurt!)
("Munbae-dong Yukkal" ALL CLEAR!)
(Hangover clear complete!) That was a nice meal!
(Finishing with the beverage from the owner!)
(PASS one bowl of broth for her health!) I won't finish this broth since I had too much sodium
Wow, no wonder they have 50 years of tradition

(Mesmerized by the rich soup!) The soup was so rich
and delicious
It was interesting
how you dip the noodles like soba
(A perfect meal...) I really enjoyed this meal
Thanks for the meal!
